subcodes.first_line: O Joseph! Say: Glory be unto Thee, O Lord of the worlds and Goal of the nations, Who art manifest through Thy Most Great Name! I beseech Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا یوسف قل سبحانک یا مولی العالم و مقصود الامم و الظاهر باسمک الاعظم اسئلک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
